course: How to be a Successful Engineer
primary_topics: Edward Tufte and visual display of information
John Snow and the 1854 Broad Street cholera outbreak
Engineer's responsibility under structural welding code
cases_mentioned: Tufte's Napoleon march to Moscow graph
Space Shuttle Challenger / Morton Thiokol / Boisjoly
people_mentioned: Sir Arthur Conan Doyle / Sherlock Holmes
notes: Lecture covers two teaching arcs: (1) Tufte on visual presentation of data with John Snow and Challenger as success/failure case studies; (2) engineer's legal responsibility under AWS structural welding code. Substantial digression in p23–p27 on classified space-laser work. Tom announces he will be in Canada and a substitute will cover the next three sessions.
course_canonical: How to be a Successful Engineer
